title: narcissus pseudonarcissus f. lobularis
intro: Narcissus pseudonarcissus f. lobularis, a variant of the wild daffodil, is a plant known for its bright yellow trumpet-shaped flowers and strap-like leaves. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Narcissus pseudonarcissus f. lobularis include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
